title: Microsoft Purview sensitivity label policies
description: Desired state for sensitivity label policies consumed by scripts/Deploy-LabelPolicies.ps1. See docs/adr/0015-label-policy-shape.md. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchangepowershell/new-labelpolicy

mode.description: Cmdlet-input modes accepted by New-LabelPolicy / Set-LabelPolicy. Per ADR 0015 §2 the lab uses only Enable + Disable; Test* values are reserved for future work. Runtime states such as 'Enforce' are normalized to 'Enable' by Deploy-LabelPolicies.ps1 (issue #192) and must NOT appear in YAML.

exchangeLocation.description: [All] or a list of mailbox SMTP addresses.

exchangeLocationException.description: Mailbox SMTP / DN / GUID, or mail-enabled group identifier (DN or SMTP). Applied to the cmdlet -ExchangeLocationException parameter when exchangeLocation is [All]. Optional; omit when no exclusions are desired. Per ADR 0015 section Scope -- Option A updated for ADR 0030 row 3 (PR for #492). Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchangepowershell/set-labelpolicy

items.description: Composite key: '<parent>/<displayName>' for sublabels, bare '<displayName>' for top-level.

labels.description: Labels to publish. Matches the composite-key shape used by Deploy-Labels.ps1 (#131).

modernGroupLocation.description: Microsoft 365 group identifiers for the Sites & Groups wizard step. Each entry is a group display name resolved at deploy time per ADR 0023 Category 3, or a group object ID. Added by ADR 0030 row 4 (#471). Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchangepowershell/set-labelpolicy

includedAdministrativeUnits.description: Entra administrative unit display names that restrict this policy to users in those AUs. Each entry is a display name resolved at deploy time per ADR 0023 Category 3 (Get-AdministrativeUnitIdByDisplayName.ps1). Empty array = no AU restriction (policy applies to all users). Added by ADR 0042 (#471 row 6). Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchangepowershell/set-labelpolicy

powerBIComplianceInformation.description: When true, this policy extends sensitivity-label enforcement into Microsoft Power BI and Microsoft Fabric workspaces. Maps to Set-LabelPolicy -PowerBIComplianceInformation. Added by ADR 0041 (#471 row 7). Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/exchangepowershell/set-labelpolicy

advancedSettings.description: Allowlist per ADR 0015 §3 (extended by ADR 0030 row 1 for OutlookDefaultLabel; row 2 for teamworkdefaultlabelid; row 5 / ADR 0040 for DefaultLabel). Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/sensitivity-labels-office-apps#configure-advanced-settings ; https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/sensitivity-labels-aip#outlook-specific-options-for-default-label-and-mandatory-labeling ; https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/sensitivity-labels-meetings
